tr.td: Acute non-ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
Human isophane insulin 70 unit/mL and recombinant human regular insulin 30 unit/mL solution for injection
Inject 20 units (0.2 mL) subcutaneously before breakfast and 10 units (0.1 mL) before dinner
1 tablet (10 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (81 mg) by mouth once daily
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
Prasugrel (as prasugrel hydrochloride) 10 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (50 mg) by mouth twice daily
1 tablet (40 mg) by mouth once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Live attenuated Human alphaherpesvirus 3 only vaccine product
Assessment of health and social care needs
Assessment using AUDIT-C (Alcohol Use Disorders Identification Test - Consumption)
Depression screening using Patient Health Questionnaire Two-Item score (procedure)
Depression screening using PHQ-9 (Patient Health Questionnaire 9) score
Acute non-ST segment elevation myocardial infarction (disorder)
Acute non-ST segment elevation myocardial infarction (disorder)
Assessment of cardiac status using monitoring device

ul.li: Patient will implement and maintain a diabetes self-management plan including dietary changes, physical activity, medication adherence, and regular blood glucose monitoring.
Maintain blood pressure below 130/80 mmHg to reduce cardiovascular and renal risk.
Adopt dietary changes, increase physical activity, and reduce sodium intake to support blood pressure control.

tr.td: Weight difference [Mass difference] --pre dialysis - post dialysis
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
